# Leavenberg Marquard Algorithm

**Summary**: An iterative optimization algorithm used for finding the minimum of functions, commonly used in non-linear least squares problems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-alloush|Alloush, 2015]] applied Levenberg-Marquardt Algorithm to perform inverse analysis and estimate reservoir parameters.
